underlying_goal: Build a complete signal registry system for a trading bot, refactor all consumers to use it, and get the full analysis pipeline running end-to-end
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly lost work to container git-reset entrypoint before diagnosing the root cause, worked inside Docker containers instead of host filesystem, and misunderstood the analysis scope (20 strategy pairs vs 400+ analysis pairs).
brief_summary: User wanted a complete signal registry built across 3 phases with Trello tracking; Claude delivered all code and tests but struggled with container resets and showed misunderstanding of the broader analysis pipeline scope.
